positive: A minimalist, celestial botanical illustration featuring a constellation formed by highly detailed, stylized blooming lunar lilies and nebula-colored foliage. The central arrangement should be balanced and symmetrical, designed to look like an elegant tattoo design or a vintage engraving. Style: Nordic folk art meets Art Nouveau, high contrast, linework focused, deep sapphire blues, creamy ivory backgrounds, and touches of shimmering gold foil accentuation. Composition: The subject must be perfectly centered and isolated on a clean, white background, suitable for screen printing. Lighting: Soft, diffuse, ethereal glow emphasizing the petal curves and leaf textures. Details: Extremely intricate, scalable vector quality, clean silhouettes, geometric patterns integrated subtly into the leaves, perfect for apparel print placement.
negative: blur, amateur, gradient, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, noisy, lowres, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, writing, busy background, harsh lighting, graffiti, photorealism
